description: A critical finding mapped to one linked transition_state_entry record. Maps to one record summary (machine_screened_needs_attention) and builds one needs_curator_review task. NOTE: the persisted precheck category vocabulary (LLMFindingCategory) does not include 'transition_state_validation'; the closest available token 'consistency' is used. The broader service-layer MachineReviewCategory has 'transition_state_validation' but the precheck source cannot emit it.

audit_event_details_json.label: needs_attention
audit_event_details_json.summary: A critical contradiction on a transition-state entry.

findings.message: Validated TS has contradictory imaginary-frequency evidence: marked validated yet the frequency set shows no single imaginary mode.
